---
id: list-agreement-sections
title: "List ordered agreement sections"
description: "Returns ordered section metadata for one agreement, including section UUIDs and taxonomy IDs, for in-document navigation."
sidebar_label: "List ordered agreement sections"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/pandects/pandects-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List ordered agreement sections"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/agreements/{agreement_uuid}/sections"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns ordered section metadata for one agreement, including section UUIDs and taxonomy IDs, for in-document navigation.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
